phrases.intent_en: Ask how to get back to the historic centre from this area
phrases.text_local: Scusi, come si torna al centro storico da qui?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KOH-meh see TOR-nah al CHEN-troh STOH-ree-koh dah kwee?
phrases.cultural_note: The ZAI (Zona Artigianale Industriale) is Verona's industrial district west of the city — tourists rarely come here intentionally.

responses.english: By bus, line 12 toward the centre.
responses.phonetic: kon low-toh-BOOS, lah LEE-neh-ah DOH-dee-chee VER-soh eel CHEN-troh.
responses.local: Con l'autobus, la linea 12 verso il centro.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest bus stop is
phrases.text_local: Buongiorno, dov'è la fermata dell'autobus più vicina?
phrases.pronunciation: bwohn-JOHR-noh, doh-VEH lah fer-MAH-tah del-low-toh-BOOS PYOO vee-CHEE-nah?

responses.english: Down there, on the side of the main road.
responses.phonetic: lee een FON-doh, sool LAH-toh DEL-lah STRAH-dah preen-chee-PAH-leh.
responses.local: Lì in fondo, sul lato della strada principale.

phrases.intent_en: Ask how long it takes to reach the Arena from here
phrases.text_local: Scusi, quanto ci vuole per arrivare all'Arena da qui?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, KWAN-toh chee VWOH-leh per ar-ree-VAH-reh al-lah-REH-nah dah kwee?

phrases.intent_en: Ask if there is a taxi nearby
phrases.text_local: Scusi, c'è un taxi in zona?
phrases.pronunciation: SKOO-zee, cheh oon TAK-see een DZOH-nah?

responses.english: Not here, call a taxi by phone.
responses.phonetic: non kwee, KYAH-mee oon TAK-see dal teh-LEH-foh-noh.
responses.local: Non qui, chiami un taxi dal telefono.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Verona Expo fairground is
phrases.cultural_note: Veronafiere is one of Italy's largest trade fair venues, hosting events like Vinitaly and Fieracavalli.

responses.english: It's the large complex nearby, the signage points to it.
responses.phonetic: eh eel GRAN-deh kom-PLES-soh kwee vee-CHEE-noh, loh een-DEE-kah lah sen-yah-leh-TEE-kah.
responses.local: È il grande complesso qui vicino, lo indica la segnaletica.
